transactions.desc: The Marlins recalled Gusto from Triple-A Jacksonville on Thursday.
The Marlins recalled Hinds from Triple-A Jacksonville on Thursday.
The Marlins optioned Brzykcy to Triple-A Jacksonville on Thursday.
The Marlins activated Junk (shin) from the 15-day injured list Thursday.
The Giants optioned Walker to Triple-A Sacramento on Thursday, Alex Pavlovic of NBC Sports Bay Area reports.
The Giants recalled Whisenhunt from Triple-A Sacramento on Thursday, Alex Pavlovic of NBC Sports Bay Area reports.
The Guardians recalled Heuer from Triple-A Columbus on Thursday.
The Guardians recalled Halpin from Triple-A Columbus on Thursday, Tim Stebbins of MLB.com reports.
The Guardians optioned Ingle to Triple-A Columbus on Thursday, Tim Stebbins of MLB.com reports.
The Red Sox recalled Harris from Triple-A Worcester on Thursday.
The Twins recalled Rojas from Triple-A St. Paul on Thursday.
The Twins activated Ober (elbow) from the 15-day injured list Thursday.
The Mets optioned Myers to Triple-A Syracuse on Thursday.
The Mets selected Hammer's contract from Triple-A Syracuse on Thursday.
The White Sox recalled Davis from Triple-A Charlotte on Thursday.
Atlanta designated Azocar for assignment Thursday.
Atlanta activated White from the paternity leave list Thursday.
The Padres selected Rengifo's contract from Triple-A El Paso on Wednesday.
Tromp cleared outright waivers Wednesday and accepted an assignment to Triple-A Norfolk, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.
The Phillies optioned Johnson to Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Wednesday.
The Phillies reinstated Keller (forearm) from the injured list Wednesday.
The Angels designated Walton for assignment Wednesday.
The Angels activated Trout (hamstring) from the 10-day injured list Wednesday.
The Pirates recalled Flores from Triple-A Indianapolis on Wednesday.
The Cardinals designated Shuster for assignment Wednesday.
The Cardinals selected Gastelum's contract from Triple-A Memphis on Wednesday.
The Phillies recalled Rangel from Triple-A Lehigh Valley to start Wednesday at Cincinnati in what's expected to be a bullpen game, Charlotte Varnes of The Athletic reports.
The Giants recalled Rodriguez from Triple-A Sacramento on Wednesday.
The Mets designated Seelinger for assignment Wednesday.
The Mets recalled Myers from Triple-A Syracuse on Wednesday.
